title: Retrospective Chart Review: Smoking and Interstitial Lung Disease
institution: UCLA Health - David Geffen School of Medicine
inclusion_criteria: ICD-10 J84.x or clinical suspicion per pulmonology note
exclusion_criteria: ILD solely from CTD with no smoking history
Occupational/environmental ILD with no smoking history
export_tool: Epic Clarity/Caboodle SQL extract + manual chart abstraction
